name_en: 🆕 M237 Champagne【Top-tier Original】Dynamic Code Synced with Counter Electronic Chip. The Pochette Louise chain bag renews the classic design with a new proportion. Exquisite glossy Epi leather or stylish matte leather creates the bag body, securely storing essentials for evening outings. Paired with a lustrous chain, it can be elegantly carried over the shoulder or in hand. 22 x 14 x 5
